items.title: Visa’s U.S. economist says strong consumer spending is driving blockbuster GDP numbers
items.description: Michael Brown, Visa’s Principal U.S. Economist, discusses better-than-expected U.S. GDP numbers and strong holiday spending.

items.title: Why Services Are Central to Mastercard's Evolving Growth Story
items.description: Mastercard's growing Services business is emerging as a key growth engine, diversifying revenues, boosting resilience and strengthening its long-term strategy.

items.title: Holiday Spending Rises Despite Inflation, This Data Shows
items.description: Retail stocks are performing well this holiday season, with a 4.2% increase in spending despite inflation concerns.

items.title: China UnionPay launches mobile app "Nihao China" to facilitate inbound tourism
items.description: SHANGHAI, Dec. 24, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- On December 19, 2025, the China International Travel Mart kicked off in south China's island province of Hainan, during which China UnionPay, a leading card scheme, rolled out the "Nihao China" app. A Media Snippet accompanying this announcement is available by clicking on this link. Dedicated to providing one-stop digital services covering payment, transportation, daily life, cultural tourism and other scenarios for foreign visitors to China, the app
